name: create_pblock
full_help:
create_pblock

Description: 
Create a new Pblock

Syntax: 
create_pblock  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Returns: 
new pblock object

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name of the new pblock

Categories: 
XDC, Floorplan

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
